image:image.image:title: Sanskar International School Hajipur Logo — CBSE School Bihar
image:image.image:caption: Official crest of Sanskar International School Hajipur — ज्ञान दीपेन भास्वता. Best CBSE school in Hajipur, Vaishali, Bihar.

image:image.image:title: Sanskar International School Hajipur Campus — Best CBSE School in Hajipur Bihar
image:image.image:caption: Main campus building of Sanskar International School at Near Devraj Path, Hathsarganj, Hajipur, Vaishali, Bihar 844102. Yellow and green building with modern infrastructure.

image:image.image:title: Sanskar International School Hajipur Student in Uniform
image:image.image:caption: Student of Sanskar International School Hajipur in school uniform — light yellow shirt and bottle green tie. Your child deserves the best.

image:image.image:title: Activity Based Learning at Sanskar International School Hajipur
image:image.image:caption: Young students engaged in hands-on activity-based learning at Sanskar International School Hajipur. NEP 2020 aligned CBSE curriculum.

image:image.image:title: Nursery Classroom at Sanskar International School Hajipur
image:image.image:caption: Nursery and Play Class students at Sanskar International School Hajipur learning with pencils and notebooks. Best nursery school in Hajipur.

image:image.image:title: Shashi Kala Singh — Principal, Sanskar International School Hajipur
image:image.image:caption: Mrs. Shashi Kala Singh, Principal of Sanskar International School Hajipur Main Campus. M.A., D.L.Ed. with 30 years of teaching experience in Bihar.

image:image.image:title: Shalini Shikha — Principal, Sanskar International School Patna Campus
image:image.image:caption: Mrs. Shalini Shikha, Principal of Sanskar International School Hajipur Patna Branch. M.A., B.Ed. with 10 years of teaching experience.

image:image.image:title: Annual Day at Sanskar International School Hajipur
image:image.image:caption: Students performing at Annual Day celebration of Sanskar International School Hajipur.

image:image.image:title: Sports Day at Sanskar International School Hajipur
image:image.image:caption: Sports Day activities at Sanskar International School Hajipur — cricket, football, kabaddi, yoga.

image:image.image:title: Cultural Fest at Sanskar International School Hajipur
image:image.image:caption: Cultural festival at Sanskar International School Hajipur showcasing dance, music, and Indian traditions.
